using Azure.Storage.Blobs;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Moq;
using System.Reflection;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Contracts;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Models;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Services;
using Xunit;

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Tests
{
    public class DiaIngestionProcessingServiceTests
    {
        private static DiaIngestionProcessingService CreateService(
            Mock<IDiaExceptionNotificationService>? notificationMock = null)
        {
            var loggerMock = new Mock<ILogger<DiaIngestionProcessingService>>();
            var blobServiceClientMock = new Mock<BlobServiceClient>();
            var configProviderMock = new Mock<IIngestionConfigurationProvider>();
            var orchestratorMock = new Mock<IDiaIngestionOrchestrator>();

            configProviderMock
                .Setup(provider => provider.GetSettings())
                .Returns(new IngestionSettings
                {
                    BlobContainerName = "dia-input"
                });

            return new DiaIngestionProcessingService(
                loggerMock.Object,
                blobServiceClientMock.Object,
                configProviderMock.Object,
                orchestratorMock.Object,
                notificationMock?.Object ?? new Mock<IDiaExceptionNotificationService>().Object);
        }

        private static async Task<(string? SelectedFile, bool FailureHandled)> InvokeSelectTargetFileAsync(
            DiaIngestionProcessingService service,
            string[] files)
        {
            MethodInfo? method = typeof(DiaIngestionProcessingService)
                .GetMethod("SelectTargetFileAsync", BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance);

            Assert.NotNull(method);

            var task = (Task<(string? SelectedFile, bool FailureHandled)>)method.Invoke(
                service,
                new object[] { files })!;

            return await task;
        }
    }
}
